calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Maria Van Wambeke, Executor/Petitioner in Propria Perona.

Discussion was held regarding a Wells Fargo Joint Checking Account held by decedent and their brother Eric Van Wambeke. Petitioner confirmed that she was added as a joint account holder. The court clarified that the joint account would not be part of the estate since the account automatically transfers to the surviving account holders. Ms. Van Wambeke agreed to strike the Wells Fargo account from the proposed order presented to the court.

The court made note of a procedural defect where the notice of the proceeding was served before the amended petition was filed. The court waived the defect in the notice to allow the matter to proceed. Ms. Van Wambeke confirmed that Paul Van Wambeke is not an heir and did not require notice.

The court took the Amended Petition for Final Distribution under submission with intent to grant as modified as to the deletion of the Wells Fargo account from the distribution list and the corresponding cash distribution.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 05, 2020 is admitted to probate. Maria Vanwabeke is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing an inventory and appraisal is set for January 23, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. .Status on close of estate is set for October 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrebra. Not reported.
